queries.question: Give me the descriptions of the assignments that every course requires.
queries.sql: SELECT Assignments.description  from Courses_Assignments join Assignments on Courses_Assignments.assignmentID = Assignments.assignmentID join Courses on Courses_Assignments.courseID = Courses.courseID   GROUP BY Courses_Assignments.assignmentID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Courses_Assignments.courseID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Courses)

queries.question: Give me the descriptions of the assignments that every course requires.
queries.sql: select courses.title , assignments.description from Courses_Assignments join Assignments on Courses_Assignments.assignmentID = Assignments.assignmentID join Courses on Courses_Assignments.courseID = Courses.courseID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?description WHERE {
  ?courses_assignments a :Courses_Assignments .
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?courses_assignments p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses_assignments p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?courses p:title ?title .
  ?assignments p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What is the type of assignment corresponding to each course?
queries.sql: select courses.title , assignments.type from Courses_Assignments join Assignments on Courses_Assignments.assignmentID = Assignments.assignmentID join Courses on Courses_Assignments.courseID = Courses.courseID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?type WHERE {
  ?courses_assignments a :Courses_Assignments .
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?courses_assignments p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses_assignments p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?courses p:title ?title .
  ?assignments p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Show me the assignment types that are in common for all courses.
queries.sql: SELECT Assignments.type  from Courses_Assignments join Assignments on Courses_Assignments.assignmentID = Assignments.assignmentID join Courses on Courses_Assignments.courseID = Courses.courseID   GROUP BY Courses_Assignments.assignmentID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Courses_Assignments.courseID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Courses)

queries.question: For each course show the assignments offered and their descriptions
queries.sql: select courses.title , assignments.type , assignments.description from Courses_Assignments join Assignments on Courses_Assignments.assignmentID = Assignments.assignmentID join Courses on Courses_Assignments.courseID = Courses.courseID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?type ?description WHERE {
  ?courses_assignments a :Courses_Assignments .
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?courses_assignments p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses_assignments p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?courses p:title ?title .
  ?assignments p:type ?type .
  ?assignments p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What type of assignments do all the courses have in common and what are their descriptions?
queries.sql: SELECT Assignments.type, Assignments.description  from Courses_Assignments join Assignments on Courses_Assignments.assignmentID = Assignments.assignmentID join Courses on Courses_Assignments.courseID = Courses.courseID   GROUP BY Courses_Assignments.assignmentID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Courses_Assignments.courseID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Courses)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the type of assignments used in each course.
Show me the types of assignments that every course comprises of abd their descriptions
Give me the descriptions of the assignments that every course requires.
